pages.raw_text:
The placing of fine Of $50 on
the firm of Burns & Hall by the
Structural alliance on account Of
that rm having employed cement
workers on the extension of the
Northern Pacic freight house will
be appealed to the International
Structural Building Trades al
lance. The Cement Workers
union sent a communication to the
Central Labor union last night ask
ing the central body to take steps
to protect employers who hired
members Of their union against the
imposition of fines by the alliance.
, The Central Labor union in
structed the secretary to call the
attention. of the international to
the action of the local alliance. AS
all the unions involved are affil-
lated with the American Federation
of Labor 1t is considered likely that
the action Of the alliance will be
reversed.
